title: [CombineAssertLike] Could it operate on `builtin.module`s instead?
body: @dobios it would be great to put CombineAssertLike into the circt-bmc pass pipeline as a way to support multiple asserts (and I wouldn't be surprised if we end up seeing other places a pipeline could benefit from this), but since the tool's pass manager needs to run on the `builtin.module` and CombineAssertLike operates on `hw.module`s, putting CombineAssertLike in the pipeline throws an error. Is there a use-case you have that relies on it being applied to a single particular hw.module for the contract work? If not then I'll spin a PR to operate on all the hw.modules within a builtin.module
